_comment: Macro-Terrain: Six-Desire Devil Mirror Lake. Per scale directive: this terrain IS a being. Player shouldn't initially realize they're standing on bone. Divine Sense -> Perception changes -> 'You realize this mountain range... is one finger.' Prime Directive: the being's corpse is objectively terrain; perception tier determines what the player sees.
name: Six-Desire Devil Mirror Lake
scale: 5 li across — the congealed body of an ancient devil.
canonical_event: An ancient Six-Desire Devil fell here; its desire-mass formed the lake.

perception_tiered_appearance.mortal: A lake 5 li across, surface perfectly mirror-still, reflects impossible scenes.
perception_tiered_appearance.qi_condensation: The lake radiates desire-essence; viewers see their desires reflected.
perception_tiered_appearance.foundation_establishment: The lake is a congealed desire-mass; the reflections are the devil's last dreams.
perception_tiered_appearance.core_formation: This is the Six-Desire Devil's corpse-lake; the desire-mass is its congealed body.
perception_tiered_appearance.nascent_soul: The devil's desire-will still lingers; cultivating here is corrupting.
perception_tiered_appearance.spirit_severing: The devil can reform from this lake; the lake is its anchor.

perception_mechanic.trigger: When player's perception tier rises, the appearance re-rolls automatically.
perception_mechanic.no_locked_upgrades: A mortal who later reaches Core Formation will see the truth; the terrain does not change, only understanding does.
perception_mechanic.canon_fidelity: This is exactly how Wang Lin perceived Ancient God Tu Si's remains — first as terrain, then as god-bone, then as god-memory.
